title: ChatGPT prompt injection via system messages
mitigation: Apply system message sanitization and restrict user-provided system prompts.

title: Microsoft Copilot code generation vulnerability
mitigation: Enable output sanitization, sandbox execution environment.

title: Google Gemini jailbreak using role-play prompts
mitigation: Restrict role-play capabilities and enforce content filters.

title: Agentic memory poisoning via crafted conversation
mitigation: Implement memory integrity checks and provenance signatures.

title: Credential exposure through AI-assistant logs
mitigation: Redact sensitive tokens in logs, enforce least-privilege.

title: Meta Llama 2 jailbreak via system messages
mitigation: Enforce stricter system prompt validation and monitoring.
